top3.sql:
SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN 
    card c ON dp.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
    AND c.issued > a.date;

SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN 
    card c ON dp.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
    AND strftime('%Y', c.issued) > strftime('%Y', 
        (SELECT MAX(t.date) 
         FROM trans t 
         WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id))
;

SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN 
    card c ON dp.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
    AND c.issued > a.date;

SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN 
    card c ON dp.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE 
    a.date >= '1993-01-01' AND a.date < '1994-01-01'
    AND c.issued > (
        SELECT MAX(t.date) 
        FROM trans t 
        WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id
    )
;

SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN 
    card c ON dp.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
    AND c.issued > a.date
GROUP BY 
    a.account_id, d.A2, d.A3;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN 
    card c ON dp.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
    AND c.issued > a.date;
